payload.answer: Recall surfaced mem_new because it is the latest active memory for Sam in the Goldman context. mem_old was excluded because it has a superseded status relative to mem_new, and superseded memories are filtered from current recall results to avoid presenting outdated information as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall query explicitly targeted Sam in the Goldman context, so the explanation is scoped to that resolved entity and context.

memory_cards.statement: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active memory for Sam associated with Goldman.
mem_old was filtered because it is marked as superseded by a newer memory and should not be presented as current.

details: Identified mem_new as the active recalled item.
Identified mem_old as filtered due to superseded status.
Explained filtering in terms of current recall semantics.

repair_options: Inspect the supersession link between mem_old and mem_new.
Verify both memories are attached to the same resolved Sam entity and Goldman context.
Check recall filters to confirm superseded memories are excluded from current results.
If mem_old should still appear, return it only in history/debug views, not as a current fact.
